nl_query: Show the complete question hierarchy for the Data Structures paper, including section names, question codes, ltree paths, max marks, attempt rule types, and group labels, highlighting any questions that lack a rubric in the approved answer key.
failed_sql:
SELECT qp.id AS paper_id, qp.title, qs.id AS section_id, qs.name, q.id AS question_id, q.code, q.path, q.max_marks, ar.rule_type, arg.group_label, ak.id AS answer_key_id, ak.status, ak.approved_by, ak.approved_at
FROM   question_paper   qp
JOIN   question_section  qs ON qs.qp_id = qp.id
JOIN   question          q  ON q.section_id = qs.id
LEFT JOIN attempt_rule                ar ON ar.question_id = q.id
LEFT JOIN attempt_rule_group          arg      ON arg.attempt_rule_id = ar.id
LEFT JOIN attempt_rule_group_question argq     ON argq.group_id = arg.id
LEFT JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id
WHERE  qp.id = :qp_id
  AND  q.lifecycle_status = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND  q.scan_status   = 'SCANNED'
  AND  q.evaluation_status IN ('NOT_ASSIGNED', 'ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS')
  AND  q.block_status  IN ('NONE', 'MALPRACTICE')
ORDER  BY qp.title, qs.display_order, q.path;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): question.block_status, question.evaluation_status, question.scan_status, question.lifecycle_status. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
